scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/offres dist/entreprises dist/methode dist/contact dist/cas-clients dist/api && cp index.html styles.css script.js robots.txt sitemap.xml favicon.svg favicon.png fast-icon.png fast-icon-tight.png fast-icon-white.png og-image.png dist/ && cp offres/index.html dist/offres/ && cp entreprises/index.html dist/entreprises/ && cp methode/index.html dist/methode/ && cp contact/index.html dist/contact/ && cp cas-clients/index.html dist/cas-clients/ && cp cas-clients/*.html dist/cas-clients/ && cp api/contact.js dist/api/contact.js && echo DONE
